title: Principle (GSM v1)
description: Identity-level, long-term normative constraint that defines what the system fundamentally is and stands for.

applicabilityConditions.description: Optional applicability guard (SIE DSL LogicalExpression JSON AST). Absent/null means universal applicability. Restricted form: AndExpression or single atom only (no Or/Not). One-predicate-per-axis invariant.

constraint.description: SIE DSL PrincipleConstraintExpression encoding: Subject × Modal × Verb × PurposeQualifier × PurposeScope(Purpose).
